topic: Korean and American hosts exploring natural daily English expressions
subtitle: Using 'How Come?' for casual questions
summary: In this episode, 민수 and Ashley dive into the casual question phrase 'How come?' to help learners ask 'Why?' in a more natural and friendly way.

dialogues.speaker: host_1
dialogues.name: 민수
dialogues.text: 여러분, 톡톡 영어에 오신 걸 환영합니다! 오늘도 자연스럽고 살아있는 영어, 함께 배워볼까요?

dialogues.speaker: host_2
dialogues.name: Ashley
dialogues.text: Hi everyone! Today's expression is 'How come?' It's a great way to ask 'Why?' in a casual, friendly way.

dialogues.speaker: host_1
dialogues.name: 민수
dialogues.text: 어, 이거 맞나요? 'How come?'이 그냥 'Why?'랑 똑같이 써도 되는 거죠?

dialogues.speaker: host_2
dialogues.name: Ashley
dialogues.text: Great question! We'll see exactly when and how to use it today. Let’s get started!

dialogues.speaker: host_1
dialogues.name: 민수
dialogues.text: Ashley, why did you cancel our lunch yesterday?

dialogues.speaker: host_2
dialogues.name: Ashley
dialogues.text: How come you want to know? Are you hungry?

dialogues.speaker: host_1
dialogues.name: 민수
dialogues.text: Haha, maybe a little. But seriously, how come you canceled? I was really looking forward to it.

dialogues.speaker: host_2
dialogues.name: Ashley
dialogues.text: Well, I wasn’t feeling well. How come you didn’t answer my message?

dialogues.speaker: host_1
dialogues.name: 민수
dialogues.text: Oh, I missed it! Sorry about that.

dialogues.speaker: host_2
dialogues.name: Ashley
dialogues.text: See? 'How come' works perfectly to ask about reasons in a casual way.

dialogues.speaker: host_2
dialogues.name: Ashley
dialogues.text: 'How come?' literally means 'Why?', but it’s less formal and more conversational.

dialogues.speaker: host_1
dialogues.name: 민수
dialogues.text: So, can I say ‘How come you didn’t come?’ instead of ‘Why didn’t you come?’

dialogues.speaker: host_2
dialogues.name: Ashley
dialogues.text: Exactly! Also, 'How come?' is followed by a normal subject and verb order, not the question word order.

dialogues.speaker: host_1
dialogues.name: 민수
dialogues.text: Ah, so I say ‘How come you are late?’ not ‘How come are you late?’ Got it!

dialogues.speaker: host_2
dialogues.name: Ashley
dialogues.text: You got it! That’s a common mistake people make when learning 'How come?'.

dialogues.speaker: host_1
dialogues.name: 민수
dialogues.text: 좀 더 쉽게 설명해 주세요! So 'How come' + subject + verb, no inversion?

dialogues.speaker: host_2
dialogues.name: Ashley
dialogues.text: Exactly! Unlike 'Why', which uses inversion like 'Why did you go?', 'How come' follows the usual order: 'How come you went?'

dialogues.speaker: host_1
dialogues.name: 민수
dialogues.text: Ashley, I sometimes say 'How come did you...' Is that wrong?

dialogues.speaker: host_2
dialogues.name: Ashley
dialogues.text: That’s a common mistake! Remember, no 'did' after 'How come'. Just say, 'How come you did...'

dialogues.speaker: host_1
dialogues.name: 민수
dialogues.text: Ah, so it’s like normal sentence order, not a question form. 하하, 또 실수했네요!

dialogues.speaker: host_2
dialogues.name: Ashley
dialogues.text: Don’t worry, let’s try again! Practice makes perfect!

dialogues.speaker: host_1
dialogues.name: 민수
dialogues.text: Thanks, Ashley! I’m going to remember: 'How come you...?'

dialogues.speaker: host_2
dialogues.name: Ashley
dialogues.text: 'How come?' is super common in American English, especially in casual talks with friends and family.

dialogues.speaker: host_1
dialogues.name: 민수
dialogues.text: So, if I want to sound more relaxed, I should use 'How come?' instead of 'Why?' Got it!

dialogues.speaker: host_2
dialogues.name: Ashley
dialogues.text: Exactly. Also, in some cases, people might say 'How come?' with a rising tone, almost like you're surprised or curious.

dialogues.speaker: host_1
dialogues.name: 민수
dialogues.text: Oh, I noticed that sometimes. It sounds more friendly than just 'Why?'.

dialogues.speaker: host_2
dialogues.name: Ashley
dialogues.text: You got it! Using the right tone makes your English sound more natural and warm.

dialogues.speaker: host_1
dialogues.name: 민수
dialogues.text: 오늘 배운 표현 다시 말해 볼게요. 'How come'은 'Why'랑 비슷하지만, 질문할 때 동사의 순서가 일반 문장처럼 돼요.

dialogues.speaker: host_2
dialogues.name: Ashley
dialogues.text: Yes! So, say 'How come you’re late?' not 'How come are you late?'. 민수, you got it!

dialogues.speaker: host_1
dialogues.name: 민수
dialogues.text: 하하, 오늘도 많이 배웠어요! 불안해 하지 말고, 자주 써 볼게요. 여러분도 'How come?' 꼭 기억하세요.

dialogues.speaker: host_2
dialogues.name: Ashley
dialogues.text: Great question! 오늘 배운 표현들 잘 기억하시고, 다음 톡톡 영어에서 만나요! 안녕~
